name: logboard-e2e
description: End-to-end tests for LogBoard LWC using UTAM + WebDriverIO

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:pageObjects && node_modules/.bin/wdio run wdio.conf.js
scripts.test:e2e:debug: npm run build:pageObjects && node_modules/.bin/wdio run wdio.conf.js --logLevel debug
scripts.test:e2e:headless: npm run build:pageObjects && HEADLESS=true node_modules/.bin/wdio run wdio.conf.js
